sample.head:
# 3-Month Instagram Lead-Generation Roadmap
## Digital Marketing Service Provider | India Market | ₹40,000/Month Budget

---

## FINAL ANSWER (Synthesized from Panel Analysis)

Based on analysis of 7 comprehensive research-driven responses, here is the definitive roadmap:

---

## (A) MEASURABLE GOALS

### Lead Targets & Cost-Per-Lead

| Month | Organic Leads | Paid Leads | Total Target | Cost Per Lead | Rationale |
|-------|---------------|-----------|--------------|---------------|-----------|
| **Month 1** | 8–12 | 12–18 | 20–30 | ₹1,200–1,600 | Cold start; algorithm learning phase |
| **Month 2** | 12–18 | 18–28 | 30–46 | ₹750–950 | Optimization begins; organic reach grows 30% |
| **Month 3** | 18–25 | 28–40 | 46–65 | ₹500–700 | Full maturity; retargeting pool expands |

**3-Month Cumulative:** 96–141 qualified leads at average ₹780 CPL  
**Conservative Alternative:** 60–80 leads at ₹350–500 CPL (if stricter qualification: responded in DM + expressed intent)

**Rationale:**  
- CPL improves 40–50% Month 1→3 due to: (a) algorithm learning, (b) audience pool growth, (c) organic reach compounding, (d) warm audience retargeting
- Lead definition: Submitted form OR replied to DM with service interest (not just impressions)
- India SMB marketing services benchmark: ₹300–600 CPL (vs. ₹120–280 for consumer products; longer consideration cycle)

---
